---
title: "ITensor"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# ITensor

## doc

```{julia}
@doc ITensor
```

```{text}
ITensor 
ord=2 # the number of order, meaning there are two Index as follow
Dim 1: (dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")' # index, Separate rows and columns.
Dim 2: (dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")
NDTensors.Dense{ComplexF64, Vector{ComplexF64}} # sepcifical matrix.
2×2
 -0.9171435002629851 + 0.2336989174957588im   …  -0.033305846289088226 - 0.3211282243740626im
 -0.10173325172253367 - 0.30640326594315254im       -0.9320905355973363 + 0.16423951279518484im
```

## usage

```{julia}
# define a operator
using RandomMeas # MeasurementSettings
N = 7 # NOTE: Warning if N ≥ 7
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
O = op("I", site_indices[1]);
for i = 2:N
    O *= op("I", site_indices[i]);
end
```

```{julia}
# turn to mpo
O_mpo = MPO(O, site_indices; cutoff=1e-15); # NOTE: if you do not cut the linkdims it will be full.
linkdims(O_mpo)
```

## performance

It not useful to constuct local operator production. And the consumption of cut linkdims is big.
